measurement: deterministic multiset line-diff for build/extension; independent LLM correctness judge on the extended result (judge model = cell model; haiku judged by sonnet); builds <3 LOC flagged degenerate and excluded
headline: Opus: 4 win / 1 tie / 0 loss on extension cost, lower build on all 5, correctness 93% vs 87%. Sonnet mixed (2 win/3 loss), Haiku unreliable (4 degenerate, ~50% correctness both arms).
